name: event_type
description: process | network | startup | registry | download | file | dns | intel | incident | prediction

name: source
description: Origin of the record: monitor | anakin | analyst | user

name: severity
description: SAFE | LOW | MEDIUM | SUSPICIOUS | HIGH | CRITICAL

name: host
description: Machine hostname the event was observed on

name: process_name
description: Process that generated the event, e.g. powershell.exe

name: country
description: GeoIP country code of the remote endpoint

name: threat_name
description: Matched Anakin campaign, e.g. Lumma Stealer

name: action
description: Recommended action: ignore | monitor | quarantine | delete | block

name: resolved
description: Whether the incident has been resolved
